overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark, futuristic industrial facility with prominent Arasaka branding. The player walks through corridors and workstations featuring robotic arms, high-tech machinery, and a large combat mech on display. The environment features low artificial lighting with fluorescent and red accent lights, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's visual style.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow industrial corridor in an Arasaka facility. Metal shelving units with branded containers line the right side while large machinery is visible on the left. The environment is artificially lit with overhead fluorescent lights, and the floor features marked tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: office workspace with illuminated desk and Arasaka logo wall

events.description: approaches illuminated desk with Arasaka branding and examines documents under desk lamp

agents.ego_description: moving toward the back wall to examine the desk area and prominent Arasaka logo

modern articulated desk lamp casting focused light on papers

glowing blue holographic screen showing data readouts

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a more open office area featuring a prominent illuminated Arasaka logo on the far wall. The player approaches a desk with an articulated lamp illuminating documents and papers. A holographic display glows on the left side of the workspace.

scene_state.functional_zone: robotic arm workstation with maintenance equipment

metal workbench surface with tools and equipment cases

segments.scene_description: The player moves to a side workstation featuring a prominent yellow industrial robotic arm. The camera circles the area, showing tool cabinets, equipment cases, and the detailed mechanics of the robotic arm. The environment remains dimly lit with focused lighting on the workbench.

agents.ego_description: walking through the open display area toward the large combat mech

entered.detail: massive bipedal combat robot with white and dark armor plating on display
raised illuminated platform with white panels and red edge lighting
interactive screen terminal showing data readouts
vertical red warning lights mounted on walls

segments.scene_description: The player returns to a wide open display floor featuring a massive combat mech robot on an illuminated platform. Red status lights accent the dark walls while the camera approaches the impressive machinery. Control terminals and additional equipment are visible around the display area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark maintenance corridor with minimal red emergency lighting

events.description: enters dark corridor with minimal lighting, illuminated only by red emergency lights and floor panels

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark corridor, moving away from the mech display into deeper darkness

entered.detail: narrow passage with minimal lighting fading into darkness
dim red lights mounted on walls providing minimal illumination
dark shapes of equipment barely visible in the shadows

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player entering a dark corridor with significantly reduced lighting. Red emergency lights provide minimal illumination along the walls while the floor panels reflect what little light remains. The environment becomes progressively darker as the camera moves deeper into the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a high-tech Arasaka facility, transitioning from sterile industrial corridors into a grand display hall before descending into a dark, oppressive passage. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor lined with metal shelving and heavy machinery under bright fluorescent lights. As the space opens up, the camera glides into an office area dominated by a glowing corporate logo and a holographic display, before shifting toward a side workstation to circle a detailed yellow industrial robotic arm. The scene then expands into a wide display floor where a massive combat mech stands on an illuminated platform accented by red status lights. Finally, the camera leaves the open hall and enters a dim corridor, where the lighting fades into deep shadows punctuated only by rhythmic red emergency lights.
